title: Magma+
description: This mod adds lots of magma items, such as tools, armor, and food!
body:
This mod adds Magma Armor and tools, crafted with a Magma Smithing Template in a Smithing Table. The armor provides fire resistance, but with the caveat of slowness to prevent it from being too overpowered. All of the tools set enemies on fire, without the need of the Fire Aspect enchantment.

Finally, this mod adds a few simpler features, fried magma cream, wart nuggets, and an easier recipe for nether bricks! If you smelt magma cream, you get fried magma cream, which is a simple food source that provides Fire Resistance for 15 seconds when consumed! If put nether wart in a crafting table, you get 9 Wart Nuggets, which can be cooked as an easy food source. Also, if you put a nether brick block in the crafting table, you get 4 nether bricks, as a tiny feature added onto everything.
